title: Suction: Happy Ghast Enchantment
description: An enchantment that suctions you onto your Happy Ghast from below it, and keeps it in place!
body:
# Suction: Rise to the Skies!
Tired of your Happy Ghast floating away, out of your reach? This enchantment makes your Ghast stay still, and allows you to float up to it, perfect for easy mounting!
- It only sucks players, so you don't have to worry about your pets getting stuck.
- It only works with access to the sky, so it won't function undergound or in the Nether.
- You can obtain it through enchanting books, Librarian trades, or as a treasure enchantment.
## Showcase: 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gsqVSsAms5I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


_This enchant is quite simple, so it should be easy for me to maintain. Feel free to make any changes, simply link back to here if you release anything!_

**Report bugs in discord**
